title: <div>- **Quality Over Quantity**: Prioritizes robust, well-tested solutions over
content:
- **Quality Over Quantity**: Prioritizes robust, well-tested solutions over rapid feature additions
- **Flexibility**: Multiple abstraction levels—from high-level APIs (Keras) for beginners to low-level operations for experts
- **Scalability**: Supports distributed training and deployment across CPUs, GPUs, and TPUs
- **Backward Compatibility**: Maintains stable APIs to protect user investments and ecosystem trust
- **Transparency & Community**: Extensive documentation and active contributions from both core maintainers and the broader ML community
- **Responsible AI**: Includes tools to identify and mitigate bias, supporting ethical AI development

### Best Implementation for Any Repository
- Establish clear versioning strategies and deprecation policies to ensure backward compatibility
- Prioritize comprehensive documentation and examples over rapid feature releases
- Create collaborative contribution pathways—make it easy for community members to propose improvements
- Implement rigorous testing and quality gates before releasing new features or versions
context: From document: :Based on the pull request at https://github.com/ivi374forivi/petasum… — chunk 12 (chunk 12/19)
